content:
❓ Common Questions About Manufacturing Grants

What is NGen?

Canada's Supercluster for advanced manufacturing projects.

Can I get funding for robotics?

Yes, through NGen, IRAP, and regional programs.

Does CDAP apply to factories?

Yes, for ERP, MES, and digital supply chain tools.

Is there funding for equipment?

Regional agencies (FedDev, etc.) fund expansion capital.

Can I stack SR&ED?

Yes, SR&ED credits often stack with other grants.

Are these loans or grants?

Mix of non-repayable grants and interest-free loans.

What are the Top Grants for Advanced Manufacturing?

NGen - Next Generation Manufacturing Canada

  • Advanced robotics and automation
  • AI and machine learning in manufacturing
  • Digital twins and simulation
  • Additive manufacturing (3D printing)
  • Up to 50% of eligible project costs
  • Consortium-based projects required
  • Scale-up and commercialization focus
  • Skills development support included

IRAP Manufacturing Innovation

  • Process automation and optimization
  • Production technology development
  • Quality control systems
  • Supply chain digitization
  • 60-80% of eligible R&D costs
  • Industrial Technology Advisor
  • Youth employment support
  • Access to research networks

CDAP - Canada Digital Adoption Program

  • Manufacturing execution systems (MES)
  • Enterprise resource planning (ERP)
  • IoT and sensor networks
  • Cloud-based manufacturing platforms
  • $15K grant for digital adoption plan
  • Up to $100K interest-free loan
  • Digital advisor support included
  • E-commerce platform development

Regional Manufacturing Development

  • FedDev Ontario - Advanced Manufacturing
  • PrairiesCan - Manufacturing Growth
  • PacifiCan - BC Manufacturing
  • ACOA - Atlantic Manufacturing
  • Equipment and machinery acquisition
  • Facility expansion and modernization
  • Process improvement initiatives
  • Workforce training and development

shortAnswer: Yes — Complete guide to Canadian advanced manufacturing innovation grants. Access $3.1B+ funding through NGen, automation programs, Industry 4.0 initiatives, and 38+ smart manufacturing programs. Funding available: up to $3.1B+.
shortAnswerQuestion: What innovation and technology grants are available in 2026?

faq.question: What is the application deadline for Canada Advanced Manufacturing Innovation Grants  | .1B+ Industry 4.0 Funding | NGen in 2026?
faq.answer: Deadlines typically vary by specific program tier. However, for 2026, many initiatives operate on a rolling intake basis until funds are depleted. Check the official portal for specific cutoffs.

faq.question: How much funding can I get through Canada Advanced Manufacturing Innovation Grants  | .1B+ Industry 4.0 Funding | NGen?
faq.answer: Funding amounts range depending on business size and scope. Top awards can reach $3.

faq.question: Do I have to give up equity for this program?
faq.answer: No. Government grants and subsidies are non-dilutive, meaning you retain 100% ownership of your company.

expertTip.title: Focus on NGen
expertTip.content: NGen (Next Generation Manufacturing Canada) is the primary funding body. Join their cluster before applying to access exclusive member-only funding calls.
